ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regression model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the model */,
  "number_of_regressors" INTEGER /* Number of regressors included in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model, including purpose and methodology */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., draft, active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset, including source and usage notes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which these metrics belong */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the model */,
  "rss" REAL /* Residual sum of squares for the model */,
  "adjusted_r_squared" REAL /* Adjusted R-squared value */,
  "ms_res" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "mallows_cp" REAL /* Mallows' Cp value for model selection */,
  "bic" REAL /* Bayesian Information Criterion value */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance score */,
  "coefficient_of_determination" REAL /* Another term for R-squared, for clarity */,
  "aic" REAL /* Akaike Information Criterion */,
  "log_likelihood" REAL /* Log-likelihood of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string, which includes browser and device information */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review or comment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been approved by an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reviews_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model affected by the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string, which includes browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
